response.step_by_step_log: Identified the song '星が降る' (Hoshi ga Furu) by Ayunda Risu. Lyrics were found using the search query: '星が降る Ayunda Risu Japanese and English lyrics'. The song is a single continuous performance. A concluding dialogue scene was also identified at the end.
response.global_summary: The video is a full music video performance for the song "Hoshi ga Furu" (As Star Fall) performed by the VTuber Ayunda Risu. It features an animated, ethereal setting where Risu sings and performs throughout the entire clip, with a brief, light-hearted dialogue segment at the end.

scenes.description: The music video for "Hoshi ga Furu" starts, with Ayunda Risu performing in a misty, enchanted setting. On-screen text displays '星が降る', and credits for Lyrics and Music.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Those of us without wings
Longed for that sky
Stretching up to reach for the stars
I tried to imitate it
Don't give up, even the wishes
The darkness that swallows them
Even so, let's go gather
The fragments of dreams by groping

Inside the wheels that just keep spinning around
Running and running
I couldn't reach it

Those of us without wings
Longed for that sky
Stretching up to reach for the stars
I tried to imitate it
Don't give up, even the wishes
The darkness that swallows them
Even so, let's go gather
The fragments of dreams by groping

Running and running
Still unable to reach
Even if I stretch and stretch
Still unable to reach
And so I continue to chase

Even if I'm swallowed by the darkness that consumes even my wishes
Even if I'm still groping in the dark
Let's go gather the fragments of dreams

Just spinning, spinning
Inside the wheel
Running, running
I'm still unable to reach

Even if I stretch and stretch
Still unable to reach
Even if I stretch and stretch
And so I continue to chase

I was just watching the backs of those
Who are walking on ahead
Someday, I'll be able to overcome them
I want to become even stronger

Born as just one person
I lost even those memories
Even if I'm crying
Even if I'm crying, I still won't be able to reach them
And so, I'll just cry and complain

I believed it was okay
Clinging to big trees
Tracing the footprints
Toward that sky

I'm just waiting to get closer
Even if I'm crying
Even if I'm crying, I still won't be able to reach them
Even if I believe

Clinging to big trees
Tracing the footprints
Toward that sky

Even if the wind blows away the clouds

Ah,
The stars are falling

scenes.description: The music video concludes, and Ayunda Risu talks to the audience about her performance and the 'giant pink monster' in the dungeon.
